title: Sub Task
description: - priority: P1

title: E11: Distributions & Miscoding Detection
description: Shareholder distributions from QBO equity accounts. Unified MiscodeDetector engine with 5-rule scoring system. Shared likely_miscoded_distributions CSV. Owner keyword collection.

title: E7: Balance Sheets (Current + Prior Year)
description: Current year (12/31/YYYY) + prior year (12/31/YYYY-1) balance sheets. Shared NormalizedRow model. Balance equation validation (A=L+E). Prior year optional.

title: Implement balance sheet normalizer (shared NormalizedRow)
description: Reuse NormalizedRow model from P&L. Normalizer validates sections constrained to {Assets, Liabilities, Equity} at parse time. Same recursive QBO JSON walking. Same level/path tracking. Per PLAN.md E3.

title: Unit tests: balance equation validation
description: Test balanced equation within tolerance -> no warning. Test mismatch exceeding tolerance -> warning generated. Test edge: exactly at tolerance boundary. Test zero totals.

title: Integration tests: balance sheet pipeline
description: Mock QBO balance sheet response -> normalize -> CSV content check -> balance equation validation -> metadata written. Test both current and prior year. Per PLAN.md §6.2.

title: Snapshot tests: balance sheet CSV
description: Golden file test. Column order matches schema version. Year in filename. Test with balanced and unbalanced fixtures.

title: Create test fixtures: QBO balance sheet responses
description: tests/fixtures/qbo/balance_sheet_2025.json (current year, balanced). tests/fixtures/qbo/balance_sheet_2024.json (prior year). Synthetic data only, fictional company.

title: Implement balance equation validation (A = L + E)
description: Assets = Liabilities + Equity within BALANCE_EQUATION_TOLERANCE. If mismatch exceeds tolerance: warning in console + validation_report.txt + deliverable metadata. Never blocks generation. Per PLAN.md E3.

title: Implement BalanceSheetDeliverable (current year)
description: key='balance_sheet', folder='02_Year-End_Balance_Sheet', required=True. Always accrual basis (no --method flag). as_of_date = 12/31/YYYY. CSV + PDF + raw JSON + metadata. Balance equation validation on generate. Per PLAN.md E3.

title: Implement balance sheet CSV output
description: Same columns as P&L CSV (section, level, row_type, label, amount, path). Filename: Balance_Sheet_{YYYY-12-31}.csv. Via batch CSV writer + atomic_write.

title: Implement balance sheet PDF output
description: Same CPA-grade layout as P&L. Header: Balance Sheet as of {date}. Sections: Assets, Liabilities, Equity. Balance equation summary at bottom. Filename: Balance_Sheet_{YYYY-12-31}.pdf.

title: Implement PriorBalanceSheetDeliverable
description: key='prior_balance_sheet', folder='02_Year-End_Balance_Sheet', required=False. as_of_date = 12/31/(YYYY-1). Same output format. Optional for validation. New company with no prior year -> generate /bin/zsh with note. Per PLAN.md E3.

title: Implement balance sheet CLI wrappers
description: cpapacket balance-sheet --year YYYY --out <base_dir> [--incremental] [--force]. cpapacket prior-balance-sheet --year YYYY --out <base_dir> [--incremental] [--force]. Thin click wrappers delegating to deliverables. Per PLAN.md E3.

title: Handle balance sheet edge cases
description: New company no prior year data -> /bin/zsh with note. Balance equation rounding tolerance. Prior year balance sheet optional for packet validation. Section validation rejects non-standard sections.

title: Unit tests: balance sheet normalization
description: Test section validation: only Assets/Liabilities/Equity accepted. Test rejection of P&L sections (Income, Expenses). Test level tracking. Test path building. Test with synthetic fixture.

title: E13: Payroll Reconciliation (Gusto vs QBO)
description: Gusto total vs QBO payroll account total. Variance calculation with PAYROLL_RECON_TOLERANCE. Auto-skipped if Gusto absent. Simple one-table PDF + CSV output.

title: E18: CI/CD Pipeline & Security
description: GitHub Actions: lint, typecheck, test, schema check, privacy check, secrets scan. Multi-platform (ubuntu + macos). Privacy check command (repo scan, fixture PII scan).

title: E3: Output Writers (CSV, PDF, JSON)
description: CPA-grade output writers: CSV (batch+streaming via atomic_write), PDF (reportlab with header/footer/page numbers), JSON (raw dump). All writes atomic.

title: Implement PDF writer base (writers/pdf_writer.py)
description: ReportLab-based PDF writer. CPA-grade template: company name header, report title, date range, page numbers in footer. Accepts Path, writes via atomic_write. Configurable margins, fonts. Per PLAN.md §2.2.

title: Implement CPA-grade PDF layout template
description: Header: company name + report title. Body: indented rows by level (NormalizedRow.level), section headers bold, subtotals with lines, totals with double lines. Footer: page X of Y, generated timestamp. Truncate long account names at 60 chars with ellipsis.

title: Implement PDF table rendering for reconciliation reports
description: Simple table layout for payroll recon, RE rollforward, contractor summary, distributions. Headers, rows, totals. Color-coded status (green=reconciled, red=mismatch). Per PLAN.md E8/E9 outputs.

title: Implement CSV writer - batch mode (writers/csv_writer.py)
description: Write complete list of rows to CSV via atomic_write. UTF-8, newline \n, minimal quoting. Numeric columns: plain numbers (no $, no commas). Dates: ISO YYYY-MM-DD. Per PLAN.md §4.6 global CSV rules.

title: Implement CSV writer - streaming mode
description: Streaming write for large datasets (General Ledger). Process rows one at a time, write immediately to temp file. Memory-efficient: only seen_ids set in memory. Via atomic_write. Per PLAN.md E4 merge & write strategy.

title: Implement JSON writer (writers/json_writer.py)
description: Raw JSON dump via atomic_write. Preserves API responses as-is. Supports --no-raw (skip writing) and --redact (remove names/IDs before writing). Per PLAN.md ADR-5.

title: Unit tests: PDF writer
description: Test PDF generation produces valid PDF file. Test header contains company name and report title. Test page numbering. Test long account name truncation at 60 chars. Test atomic write (no partial PDFs).

title: Unit tests: CSV writer (batch + streaming)
description: Test batch mode writes all rows. Test streaming mode produces identical output. Test UTF-8 encoding. Test minimal quoting. Test numeric format (no symbols). Test ISO dates. Test empty input produces header only. Test atomic write.

title: Unit tests: JSON writer
description: Test raw JSON preserved exactly. Test --no-raw skips writing. Test --redact removes sensitive fields. Test atomic write. Test large payload handling.

title: E2: Data Layer (SessionDataStore, Cache, Providers)
description: Session-scoped data cache with disk persistence. In-memory + _meta/private/cache/ disk. Request coalescing, integrity validation, cache key generation, typed data providers. Zero duplicate API calls.

title: Implement cache key definitions (data/keys.py)
description: Cache key generation: sha256(canonical_json({source, endpoint, params, schema, cache_version})). Canonical JSON: sorted keys, stable float-free encoding, normalized date strings. Keys generated only at provider layer (ADR-12a). Per PLAN.md Appendix E.

title: Unit tests: SessionDataStore --force and --no-cache
description: Test --force bypasses in-memory cache. Test --force bypasses disk cache. Test --no-cache allows in-memory but not disk writes. Test normal mode uses both caches.

title: Unit tests: data providers
description: Test each provider function calls correct endpoint with correct params. Test cache key generation at provider layer. Test providers return properly typed results. Test error propagation from store.

title: Integration test: SessionDataStore cache hit (no duplicate API calls)
description: Mock HTTP via respx. First request fetches from API. Second request for same data returns cached without HTTP call. Verify exactly 1 HTTP call made. Per PLAN.md success metric: zero duplicate API calls.

title: Integration test: SessionDataStore --force flag
description: Mock HTTP via respx. Pre-warm cache. Request with --force. Verify fresh HTTP call made despite warm cache. Verify new response replaces cached.

title: Implement SessionDataStore: in-memory cache (data/store.py)
description: Dict-based in-memory cache keyed by cache key. Thread-safe. Returns cached response on subsequent requests within same session. Single instance shared across all deliverable generators during build. Per PLAN.md ADR-7.

title: Implement SessionDataStore: disk cache persistence
description: Write to _meta/private/cache/{cache_key}.json.gz (gzip compressed) + {cache_key}.meta.json (metadata). Read from disk on session start for warm cache. TTL-based expiry after CACHE_TTL_HOURS. Per PLAN.md Appendix E.

title: Implement SessionDataStore: request coalescing
description: Concurrent requests for same cache key must await a single in-flight HTTP call. Lock per cache key protects both read/validate and in-flight request coalescing. Thread-safe. Per PLAN.md Appendix E.

title: Implement SessionDataStore: integrity validation
description: Validate payload_sha256 against uncompressed payload on cache read. On mismatch: treat as miss, quarantine corrupt entry under _meta/private/cache/quarantine/, re-fetch. Per PLAN.md Appendix E.

title: Implement data providers high-level accessors (data/providers.py)
description: Typed query functions: get_pnl(year, method), get_balance_sheet(year, as_of), get_general_ledger(year, month), get_payroll_runs(year), get_accounts(), get_company_info(). Cache keys generated here only (ADR-12a). Deliverables cannot construct endpoint URLs. Per PLAN.md ADR-12a.

title: Unit tests: cache key generation
description: Test deterministic key generation. Test same params -> same key. Test different params -> different key. Test canonical JSON sorting. Test date normalization in keys.

title: Unit tests: SessionDataStore cache operations
description: Test in-memory cache hit/miss. Test disk cache write/read. Test gzip compression. Test meta.json structure. Test TTL expiry. Test integrity validation (sha256 match/mismatch). Test quarantine on corruption.

title: Unit tests: SessionDataStore request coalescing
description: Test concurrent requests for same key coalesce to single fetch. Test concurrent requests for different keys proceed independently. Test lock cleanup on exception.

title: E12: Retained Earnings Rollforward
description: Cross-deliverable RE calculation: Beginning RE + Net Income - Distributions = Expected Ending RE. Structural checks (basis risk, negative RE, direct postings). Uses shared MiscodeDetector.

title: E1: Core Infrastructure (RunContext, Filesystem, Retry)
description: Core framework: RunContext immutable config, atomic_write, path sanitization, retry policy, rate limiter, Deliverable Protocol, DeliverableResult, DELIVERABLE_REGISTRY. Foundation for all deliverables.

title: Implement RunContext Pydantic model (core/context.py)
description: Frozen Pydantic BaseModel with: year, run_id (uuid4), year_source, out_dir (Path), method (accrual|cash), non_interactive, on_conflict, incremental, force, no_cache, no_raw, redact, include_debug, verbose, quiet, plain, skip (list[str]), owner_keywords (list[str]), gusto_available. Per PLAN.md §4.3.

title: Implement retry policy decorator (core/retry.py)
description: 429 -> exponential backoff with jitter, honor Retry-After header, up to RETRY_MAX_429 retries. 5xx -> RETRY_MAX_5XX retries with backoff. Other 4xx -> fail immediately with descriptive error. Token expiry check before each request. Per PLAN.md ADR-11.

title: Implement rate limiter / concurrency semaphore (core/limiter.py)
description: Bounded concurrency semaphore. Per-service limits: QBO_MAX_CONCURRENCY, GUSTO_MAX_CONCURRENCY. Prevents rate-limit storms when build runs concurrent steps making multiple API calls. Per PLAN.md ADR-11.

title: Implement file-exists prompt utility (utils/prompts.py)
description: Reusable Overwrite/Copy/Abort prompt. Copy suffix: __copy_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS. Interactive: prompt user. Non-interactive without --on-conflict: Abort (safe default). --on-conflict overwrite|copy|abort: explicit control. Per PLAN.md E1 §5.

title: Unit tests: RunContext construction and defaults
description: Test: on_conflict defaults (prompt interactive, abort non-interactive), year inference, method defaults to accrual, skip list parsing, boolean flag interactions (verbose+quiet mutual exclusion), frozen model immutability.

title: Unit tests: --year inference logic
description: Test all three resolution paths: explicit flag wins, directory name parsing for various patterns, default logic for each month. Edge cases: future years, year 0, non-numeric directory names.

title: Unit tests: atomic_write
description: Test normal write cycle. Test crash simulation: verify no partial file with expected name. Test concurrent writes to different files. Test overwrite existing file atomically. Test binary mode.

title: Unit tests: path sanitization
description: Test company names with spaces, special chars (/ \ : * ? \" < > |), Unicode, empty string, very long names, consecutive spaces/underscores. Verify sanitized names are filesystem-safe.

title: Unit tests: DeliverableMetadata + fingerprinting
description: Test fingerprint stability (same inputs -> same hash). Test fingerprint sensitivity (different inputs -> different hash). Test metadata serialization round-trip. Test schema version recording.

title: Unit tests: retry policy (pure function logic)
description: Test exponential backoff calculation. Test jitter bounds. Test Retry-After header honoring. Test 429 vs 5xx vs 4xx routing. Test max retry limits. All without actual HTTP calls.

title: Unit tests: rate limiter concurrency bounds
description: Test semaphore acquisition/release. Test per-service limits enforced. Test concurrent access doesn't exceed bounds. Test cleanup on exception.

title: Implement --year inference logic in RunContext construction
description: Resolution order: 1) explicit --year flag, 2) infer from existing packet dir name matching *_{YYYY}_CPA_Packet, 3) default: prev year if Jan-Sep, current year if Oct-Dec. Always log resolved year + source. Per PLAN.md Appendix D.

title: Unit tests: file-exists prompt utility
description: Test overwrite mode (replaces file). Test copy mode (creates timestamped copy). Test abort mode (raises/returns). Test interactive prompt flow. Test non-interactive defaults.

title: Unit tests: Deliverable Protocol compliance
description: Test that all registered deliverable implementations satisfy the Protocol contract. Verify key, folder, required, dependencies, requires_gusto are set. Verify generate() signature.

title: Implement CLI main.py click group with global flags
description: Click group with all global flags from PLAN.md Appendix D: --version, --verbose/-v, --quiet/-q, --plain, --non-interactive, --on-conflict, --incremental, --force, --no-cache, --no-raw, --redact, --include-debug, --owner-keywords. Construct RunContext and pass via click context.

title: Implement Deliverable Protocol (deliverables/base.py)
description: Runtime-checkable Protocol with: key (str), folder (str), required (bool), dependencies (list[str]), requires_gusto (bool), gather_prompts(ctx)->dict, is_current(ctx)->bool, generate(ctx, store, prompts)->DeliverableResult. Per PLAN.md §4.3.

title: Implement DeliverableResult Pydantic model
description: Pydantic BaseModel: deliverable_key (str), success (bool), artifacts (list[str] - relative paths), warnings (list[str]), error (str|None). Returned by every deliverable's generate() method.

title: Implement DELIVERABLE_REGISTRY scaffold (deliverables/registry.py)
description: Ordered list of Deliverable implementations with dependency resolution. get_ordered_registry() returns topological sort. Supports filtering by key. Per PLAN.md ADR-12.

title: Implement atomic_write function (core/filesystem.py)
description: Write content to .tmp sibling file, then os.replace() to final path. Context manager pattern. Never leave partial outputs. Support text and binary modes. Per PLAN.md ADR-10.

title: Implement path sanitization (core/filesystem.py)
description: Company name sanitization for filesystem: replace spaces with _, remove / \ : * ? \" < > |, collapse multiple underscores. Safe directory creation with parents. Per PLAN.md E1.

title: Implement DeliverableMetadata model + input fingerprinting (core/metadata.py)
description: Pydantic model: deliverable, generated_at, inputs, input_fingerprint (sha256), schema_versions, artifacts, warnings, data_sources. Fingerprint = sha256(json.dumps(sorted(inputs.items()), sort_keys=True)). Read/write to _meta/private/deliverables/. Per PLAN.md ADR-9.

title: E8: General Ledger Deliverable
description: Full-year GL with monthly slicing (12 API calls). Streaming CSV with dedup by txn_id. Bounded concurrency. Resumable caching per month. CSV + raw JSON only (no PDF).

title: Implement GeneralLedgerRow Pydantic model (models/general_ledger.py)
description: Frozen Pydantic model: txn_id (str), date, transaction_type, document_number, account_name, account_type, payee, memo, debit (Decimal >= 0), credit (Decimal >= 0), signed_amount (debit - credit). Per PLAN.md §4.3.

title: Implement GL validation checks
description: Row count > 0 (warn if 0). Optional: sum of all signed_amount approximately equals 0 (balanced ledger check). Signed amount = debit - credit (positive debits). Per PLAN.md E4.

title: Handle GL edge cases
description: Month with zero transactions -> empty slice, skip in merge. QBO API timeout -> retry via shared policy. Missing fields -> include with empty strings. Unicode in memos/payees -> preserve UTF-8.

title: Unit tests: GeneralLedgerRow model
description: Test valid construction. Test debit/credit >= 0 enforcement. Test signed_amount = debit - credit. Test frozen immutability. Test Decimal precision. Test missing optional fields default to empty string.

title: Unit tests: GL deduplication logic
description: Test duplicate txn_id removal (keep first). Test composite hash fallback when txn_id missing. Test no false dedup (different txns with different IDs both kept). Test boundary transaction (appears in 2 months).

title: Unit tests: GL monthly merge
description: Test 12 months merge into chronological order. Test empty months skipped. Test dedup across months. Test streaming output matches batch output.

title: Integration tests: GL pipeline (12 mock responses)
description: Mock 12 monthly QBO GL responses via respx. Full pipeline: monthly slicing -> cache -> normalize -> streaming CSV -> dedup verified. Verify cache hit on re-run. Per PLAN.md §6.2.

title: Integration test: GL bounded concurrency
description: Verify concurrent GL slice pulls don't exceed QBO_MAX_CONCURRENCY. Mock HTTP with respx. Track concurrent request count. Per PLAN.md §6.2.

title: Snapshot tests: GL CSV golden file
description: Golden file test for GL CSV. Column order matches schema version. Verify dedup applied. Verify year in filename.

title: Create test fixtures: QBO GL monthly responses
description: tests/fixtures/qbo/general_ledger_jan.json through general_ledger_dec.json. Synthetic data with overlapping transactions at month boundaries for dedup testing.

title: Implement GL normalizer (QBO GeneralLedgerDetail -> rows)
description: Parse QBO GeneralLedgerDetail response into list[GeneralLedgerRow]. Extract all fields. Handle missing optional fields (empty strings). Preserve Unicode in memos/payees. Per PLAN.md E4.

title: Implement monthly slicing (12 API calls per year)
description: For month in 1..12: fetch GeneralLedgerDetail with start_date=YYYY-MM-01, end_date=YYYY-MM-{last_day}. Each slice cached individually via SessionDataStore. Resumable: partial failure resumes from last successful month. Per PLAN.md ADR-4.

title: Implement GL merge + deduplication by txn_id
description: Merge monthly slices chronologically. Deduplicate by txn_id using seen_ids: set[str]. Keep first occurrence by month. Fallback: composite hash of date+type+doc_num+account+debit+credit+payee+memo if txn_id missing. Per PLAN.md E4.

title: Implement GL streaming CSV writer
description: Process one month at a time. For each normalized row: check txn_id against seen_ids, write immediately to temp file. Avoids holding full year in memory. Only seen_ids set persists. Via atomic_write. Per PLAN.md E4.

title: Implement GeneralLedgerDeliverable
description: key='general_ledger', folder='03_Full-Year_General_Ledger', required=True. Monthly slicing -> bounded concurrency via shared limiter -> streaming CSV + raw JSON + metadata. CSV only (no PDF - ledger too large). Per PLAN.md E4.

title: Implement GL bounded concurrency for slice pulls
description: Monthly slice pulls use QBO_MAX_CONCURRENCY via shared limiter (core/limiter.py). Prevents rate-limit storms. ThreadPoolExecutor with max_workers=QBO_MAX_CONCURRENCY. Per PLAN.md ADR-11.

title: Implement GL metadata (cached months + fingerprint)
description: _meta/private/deliverables/general_ledger_YYYY_metadata.json with cached months list, input fingerprint, schema version, artifact list. Track which months came from cache vs fresh API. Per PLAN.md E4.

title: Implement GL CLI wrapper (cli/general_ledger.py)
description: cpapacket general-ledger --year YYYY --out <base_dir> [--incremental] [--force]. Thin click wrapper. Output: General_Ledger_{YYYY}.csv + General_Ledger_{YYYY}_raw.json. Per PLAN.md E4.

title: E15: Build Command & Orchestration
description: Registry-driven build command. Concurrent steps 2-5 via ThreadPoolExecutor. Pre-flight auth, upfront prompts, --validate-only, --incremental, --force, --skip, --method. Exit code precedence.

title: E10: Contractor Summary & 1099 Flags
description: Contractor payments from QBO. Account detection (interactive). Payment method classification (card vs non-card). 1099 threshold flagging. Reconciliation safeguard.

title: E5: Authentication & Token Management
description: QBO + Gusto OAuth 2.0 flows. Keyring storage + encrypted JSON fallback. Token refresh with serialization lock. Auth CLI commands (login/status/logout). Gusto availability detection for graceful degradation.

title: Implement OAuth base infrastructure (clients/auth.py)
description: Shared OAuth2 token management. Authorization Code flow with PKCE. Token storage via keyring (macOS Keychain / Linux Secret Service) with encrypted JSON fallback in ~/.config/cpapacket/. Token refresh serialization lock. Per PLAN.md E11.

title: Unit tests: OAuth token management
description: Test token storage to keyring. Test fallback to encrypted JSON. Test token clearing. Test expiry checking. Test refresh flow. Mock keyring for testing.

title: Unit tests: token refresh serialization
description: Test concurrent refresh attempts are serialized (single lock). Test no race conditions. Test refresh failure handling. Test retry after failed refresh.

title: Integration tests: QBO auth (mocked HTTP)
description: Test full OAuth flow with mocked Intuit endpoints via respx. Test token exchange. Test token refresh. Test expiry detection + auto-refresh. Test auth failure -> exit code 1.

title: Integration tests: Gusto auth (mocked HTTP)
description: Test full OAuth flow with mocked Gusto endpoints via respx. Test graceful degradation when Gusto not configured. Test gusto_available flag propagation.

title: CLI tests: auth commands
description: Test auth qbo login/status/logout via CliRunner. Test auth gusto login/status/logout. Test status shows valid/expired/missing. Test logout clears tokens. Test login failure messages.

title: Implement keyring token storage with encrypted JSON fallback
description: Primary: keyring library for OS-level secure storage. Fallback: encrypted local JSON file in ~/.config/cpapacket/ (via platformdirs). Clear tokens from memory after use. Never log tokens or secrets. Per PLAN.md §5.2.1.

title: Implement token refresh with serialization lock
description: Serialize refresh per provider (single lock) to prevent concurrent refresh races under build parallelism. Check expiry before each request. If expired, attempt refresh. If refresh fails, prompt re-auth. Per PLAN.md E11.

title: Implement QBO OAuth client (clients/qbo.py)
description: QBO OAuth 2.0 with PKCE. httpx-based HTTP client with connection pooling. Scopes: com.intuit.quickbooks.accounting. Auto token refresh. Explicit timeouts: connect 10s, read 90s. Uses shared retry + limiter. Per PLAN.md §4.1.

title: Implement QBO Company Info fetch
description: GET /v3/company/{id}/companyinfo/{id}. Used by all commands for company name. Lightweight API call used by doctor for connectivity check. Return company name for packet dir naming.

title: Implement Gusto OAuth client (clients/gusto.py)
description: Gusto OAuth 2.0. httpx-based. Scopes: payrolls:read employees:read companies:read. Separate token storage. Same retry/timeout behavior as QBO. Optional - tool degrades gracefully without it. Per PLAN.md §4.2.

title: Implement Gusto availability detection
description: Check if Gusto tokens exist in keyring. If no tokens/credentials: set gusto_available=False on RunContext. Build auto-skips Gusto-dependent deliverables. Never hard-fail if Gusto auth absent. Per PLAN.md ADR-13.

title: Implement auth CLI: cpapacket auth qbo login/status/logout
description: auth qbo login: launch browser for QBO OAuth consent, receive callback, store tokens. auth qbo status: show token status (valid/expired/missing). auth qbo logout: clear stored tokens. Per PLAN.md E11.

title: Implement auth CLI: cpapacket auth gusto login/status/logout
description: Same flow as QBO auth but for Gusto. auth gusto login: browser OAuth. auth gusto status: token status. auth gusto logout: clear tokens. Report 'not configured' rather than 'failed' if absent.

title: E4: Packet Management (Structure, Validation, Zip)
description: Packet directory structure manager, validation engine (Present/Missing/Incomplete/Skipped), packet manifest, summary file (00_PACKET_SUMMARY.md), zip archiver with _meta/public only by default.

title: Implement packet directory structure manager (packet/structure.py)
description: Derive {CompanyName}_{TaxYear}_CPA_Packet/ from QBO Company Info API. Sanitize company name. Create directories lazily on first write. Always create _meta/public/ and _meta/private/ on build. Per PLAN.md E1 §1.

title: Implement zip: _meta/public only default + --include-debug override
description: Default: zip includes deliverable folders, 00_PACKET_SUMMARY.md, _meta/public/* (validation_report.txt, packet_manifest.json, data_health_check.txt). Excludes _meta/private/**. --include-debug adds _meta/private/cpapacket.log. Per PLAN.md §5.2.6.

title: Unit tests: packet structure manager
description: Test packet dir name derivation from company info. Test sanitization applied. Test lazy dir creation. Test _meta always created on build init. Test path resolution for deliverable folders.

title: Unit tests: company name sanitization
description: Test names with special chars, spaces, Unicode. Test empty string. Test very long names. Test consecutive special chars collapse.

title: Unit tests: validation engine
description: Test Present classification (all files + metadata). Test Missing classification (required, no files). Test Incomplete (partial files). Test Skipped (Gusto-absent deliverables). Test validation report output format. Test exit code recommendation.

title: Unit tests: packet manifest
description: Test manifest JSON structure matches spec. Test no secrets in manifest. Test timing recording. Test validation summary counts.

title: Unit tests: zip archiver
description: Test zip creation includes correct files. Test _meta/private excluded by default. Test --include-debug adds log file. Test Overwrite/Copy/Abort behavior. Test source folder not deleted. Test large packet zipping.

title: Snapshot tests: validation report format
description: Golden file test for validation report including Present, Missing, Skipped statuses. Test formatting consistency.

title: Snapshot tests: packet manifest JSON structure
description: Golden file test for packet manifest. Verify JSON structure matches PLAN.md spec. Verify no sensitive data.

title: Implement company name sanitization for filesystem
description: Replace spaces with _, remove / \ : * ? \" < > |, collapse multiple underscores. Handle Unicode. Preserve readability. Used for packet root dir name.

title: Implement lazy directory creation for deliverable folders
description: DELIVERABLE_FOLDERS constant maps keys to folder names. Directories created only when a deliverable command runs and produces output. Exception: _meta/ always created by build. Per PLAN.md ADR-2.

title: Implement validation engine (packet/validator.py)
description: Iterate DELIVERABLE_REGISTRY to determine expected files. Cross-reference per-deliverable metadata in _meta/. Use regex patterns to match naming conventions. Classify each deliverable: Present/Missing/Incomplete/Skipped. Per PLAN.md E1 §2.

title: Implement deliverable status classification rules
description: Present: all expected files exist + metadata valid. Missing: no files found + deliverable is required. Incomplete: some files found but not all expected. Skipped: deliverable was explicitly skipped or auto-skipped (Gusto absent). Per PLAN.md validation rules table.

title: Implement validation report generation
description: Write _meta/public/validation_report.txt. List each deliverable with status, expected vs found files. Include reconciliation flags. Include Skipped status for Gusto-absent deliverables. Per PLAN.md E1 §2.

title: Implement packet manifest generation
description: Write _meta/public/packet_manifest.json with: tool_version, run_id, year, method, started_at, finished_at, deliverables[] (key, required, status, artifacts, timing_ms, warnings), validation_summary (counts by status + recommended exit code). No secrets. Per PLAN.md E1 §2b.

title: Implement packet summary file (00_PACKET_SUMMARY.md)
description: Plain Markdown at packet root. Contains: tool version, tax year, accounting method, list of generated/skipped deliverables with reasons, validation warnings, reconciliation flags, payroll availability note. No secrets. Per PLAN.md E1 §2a.

title: Implement zip archiver (packet/zipper.py)
description: Create <base_dir>/<PacketName>.zip. Include entire packet folder but _meta/public/ only by default (exclude _meta/private/). Handle existing zip via on_conflict (Overwrite/Copy/Abort). Do NOT delete source folder. Per PLAN.md E1 §3.

title: Test Task Beta
description: - priority: P1

title: Test Task Alpha
description: - priority: P0

title: E20: Testing Infrastructure & Coverage
description: Test pyramid: ~200 unit, ~50 integration, ~30 CLI, ~20 snapshot tests. conftest.py, synthetic fixtures, 85% coverage gate. Schema version CI tests.

title: E16: Health Check & Doctor Commands
description: QBO data quality pre-check (uncategorized txns, undeposited funds, suspense, open prior items, payroll sync). Doctor command (filesystem, tokens, connectivity, Python env).

title: E14: Estimated Tax Tracker & Deadlines
description: Local JSON-based tax tracker. init/update/mark-paid/status commands. Persistent in ~/.config/cpapacket/. Default deadlines (Federal + NY + DE). Deadline awareness (PAST DUE / UPCOMING).

title: E0: Project Scaffolding & Foundations
description: Phase 0 foundations: pyproject.toml, src layout, .gitignore, constants, utilities, logging setup. Must complete before any feature work.

title: Create pyproject.toml with all dependencies and entry point
description: Create pyproject.toml with: Python 3.11+, click, pydantic v2, httpx, reportlab, rich, keyring, platformdirs. Dev deps: pytest, respx, ruff, mypy, pdfplumber. Entry point: cpapacket=cpapacket.cli.main:cli. src-layout.

title: Unit tests: constants validation
description: Verify all required constants exist, DELIVERABLE_FOLDERS covers all deliverables, SCHEMA_VERSIONS has entries for each, tolerance values are positive Decimals, concurrency limits are positive ints.

title: Unit tests: date utilities
description: Test last_day_of_month for all months including leap year. Test --year inference: explicit wins, directory name parsing, default logic (Jan-Sep=prev year, Oct-Dec=current). Edge cases: malformed dir names.

title: Unit tests: currency formatting
description: Test Decimal->display: CSV format (no symbols), PDF format ($ + commas). Edge cases: zero, negative, large numbers, very small amounts. Verify no float usage anywhere in formatting.

title: Unit tests: logging configuration
description: Test dual handler setup. Verify console level changes with --verbose/--quiet. Verify file handler always DEBUG. Test NO_COLOR respect. Test --plain disables rich.

title: Create src/cpapacket package layout with all __init__.py
description: Create directory tree: src/cpapacket/{cli,deliverables,core,data,clients,models,writers,packet,reconciliation,utils}/ with __init__.py in each. Match PLAN.md §2.3 project structure exactly.

title: Create test directory structure
description: Create tests/{conftest.py,fixtures/,test_cli/,test_core/,test_deliverables/,test_clients/,test_data/,test_models/,test_writers/,test_packet/,test_reconciliation/} with __init__.py files.

title: Create .gitignore with comprehensive security patterns
description: Must exclude: .env*, *.pem, *.key, *_CPA_Packet/, *_CPA_Packet.zip, _meta/, tax_tracker_*.json, tax_deadlines_*.json, generated PDFs/CSVs in packet dirs. Per PLAN.md §5.2.2.

title: Create pre-commit hook for PII pattern scanning
description: Scan staged .json files under tests/ for SSN format (\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}), EIN format (\d{2}-\d{7}), and other PII patterns. Fail commit if found. Per PLAN.md §5.2.3.

title: Create constants module (utils/constants.py)
description: All named constants: DELIVERABLE_FOLDERS mapping, BALANCE_EQUATION_TOLERANCE, PAYROLL_RECON_TOLERANCE, RETAINED_EARNINGS_TOLERANCE, CONTRACTOR_1099_THRESHOLD, MISCODE_* thresholds, RETRY_MAX_429, RETRY_MAX_5XX, QBO_MAX_CONCURRENCY, GUSTO_MAX_CONCURRENCY, CACHE_TTL_HOURS, SCHEMA_VERSIONS dict. Per PLAN.md Appendix A+G.

title: Create date utilities module (utils/dates.py)
description: Fiscal year helpers: last_day_of_month, --year inference logic (1: explicit flag, 2: infer from dir name, 3: default based on current month). ISO date formatting. Per PLAN.md Appendix D --year resolution.

title: Create currency formatting module (utils/formatting.py)
description: Decimal -> display string formatting. CSV: plain numeric 2dp no symbols. PDF: $ with commas. Indentation helpers for PDF. All use decimal.Decimal, never float. Per PLAN.md §4.4.

title: Create logging configuration module (utils/logging.py)
description: Dual logging: RichHandler to console at INFO (DEBUG with --verbose, WARNING with --quiet), FileHandler to _meta/private/cpapacket.log at DEBUG always. Respect NO_COLOR and --plain. Per PLAN.md ADR-8.

title: E17: CLI Polish & UX
description: Rich progress bars, tables, panels, tree views. --verbose/--quiet/--plain/--version flags. NO_COLOR support. Actionable error messages. PDF typography. isatty() detection.

title: E19: Documentation & Distribution
description: README.md, auth setup guide, PyPI packaging, pipx install instructions, --help on every command with examples.

title: E9: Payroll Summary (Gusto)
description: Annual payroll from Gusto. Company-level + per-employee breakdowns. 401(k) separation. Directory structure with 00_Company_Summary/ + Employees/. Auto-skipped if Gusto absent.

title: E6: Profit & Loss Deliverable
description: P&L from QBO Reports API. Normalize nested QBO JSON into NormalizedRow. CSV + PDF + raw JSON + metadata. Handles empty reports, long account names, cross-year ranges.

title: Implement NormalizedRow Pydantic model (models/normalized.py)
description: Frozen Pydantic BaseModel shared by P&L and Balance Sheet. Fields: section (str), label (str), amount (Decimal, 2dp), row_type (header|account|subtotal|total), level (int >= 0), path (str). ConfigDict(frozen=True). Per PLAN.md §4.3.

title: Unit tests: NormalizedRow Pydantic validation
description: Test valid construction. Test rejection of invalid row_type. Test non-negative level enforcement. Test Decimal amount with 2dp. Test frozen model immutability. Test path building.

title: Unit tests: P&L normalization logic
description: Test nested QBO JSON -> flat NormalizedRow list. Test section tracking across Income/COGS/Expenses. Test level tracking for deeply nested accounts. Test Summary vs Data row classification. Test path building accuracy.

title: Integration tests: P&L pipeline (mock -> CSV/PDF)
description: Mock QBO P&L response via respx -> SessionDataStore -> normalize -> CSV content verification (correct columns, amounts) -> PDF generation. Full pipeline test. Per PLAN.md §6.2.

title: Snapshot tests: P&L CSV golden file
description: Golden file test for P&L CSV output. Verify column order matches SCHEMA_VERSIONS declaration. Verify year in filename. Test with standard and empty fixtures.

title: Snapshot tests: P&L PDF content
description: Extract PDF text via pdfplumber. Verify expected strings present: company name, date range, method, section headers, totals. Verify page numbering.

title: Create test fixture: QBO P&L annual response
description: Synthetic QBO P&L API response in tests/fixtures/qbo/profit_and_loss_annual.json. Fictional company, realistic nested structure with Income/COGS/Expenses/Other sections. Multiple accounts at various nesting levels.

title: Create test fixture: QBO P&L empty response
description: Synthetic QBO P&L API response with no transactions in tests/fixtures/qbo/profit_and_loss_empty.json. Valid structure but all amounts /bin/zsh.

title: Implement P&L normalizer (QBO JSON -> NormalizedRow)
description: Recursively walk QBO Rows->Row->ColData. Track current section (Income, COGS, Expenses, Other Income, Other Expense). Track nesting level. Classify rows as header/account/subtotal/total. Build path string (Income > Sales > Product Sales). Handle Summary vs Data rows. Per PLAN.md E2.

title: Implement PnlDeliverable (deliverables/pnl.py)
description: Implements Deliverable Protocol. key='pnl', folder='01_Year-End_Profit_and_Loss', required=True. gather_prompts: none needed. generate: fetch via data store -> normalize -> CSV + PDF + JSON + metadata. Handle file-exists via RunContext. Per PLAN.md E2.

title: Implement P&L CSV output
description: CSV columns: section, level, row_type, label, amount, path. Via batch CSV writer + atomic_write. Filename: Profit_and_Loss_{start}_to_{end}_{method}.csv. Per PLAN.md Appendix C.

title: Implement P&L PDF output (CPA-grade layout)
description: CPA-grade PDF: company name header, report title, date range, method. Indented body by level. Section headers bold. Subtotals with lines, totals with double lines. Footer with page numbers. Filename: Profit_and_Loss_{start}_to_{end}_{method}.pdf. Per PLAN.md E2.

title: Implement P&L raw JSON output + metadata writing
description: Save raw QBO API response to *_raw.json via atomic_write. Write _meta/private/deliverables/pnl_metadata.json with input fingerprint, schema version, artifact list. Respect --no-raw and --redact flags.

title: Implement P&L CLI wrapper (cli/pnl.py)
description: Thin click command: cpapacket pnl --start YYYY-MM-DD --end YYYY-MM-DD --method accrual|cash --out <base_dir> [--incremental] [--force]. No defaults for standalone mode (requires explicit dates). Delegates to PnlDeliverable. Per PLAN.md E2.

title: Handle P&L edge case: empty report (/bin/zsh totals)
description: QBO returns empty report (no transactions) -> generate files with /bin/zsh totals, add note in metadata warnings. PDF shows 'No transactions found' message. CSV has header only with /bin/zsh totals row.

title: Handle P&L edge case: long account names + cross-year ranges
description: Very long account names: PDF truncates at 60 chars with ellipsis, CSV preserves full name. Date range crossing tax years: allowed for quarterly P&L use case.
